title: Seasonal food safety - Canada.ca
content:
## Seasonal food safety
Be aware of food safety risks for each season, including during the school year, summertime, Halloween and the holiday season.

## Services and information
Learn how to keep your family safe from food poisoning during the holidays by following some basic food safety tips.
Follow these food safety tips to prevent food poisoning when packing school lunches. Also be aware of common allergies to avoid potentially harming other children at school.

### Halloween food safety
Protect children from getting sick at Halloween by following these food safety tips.

### Food tips for summer and warm conditions
Be aware of the increased risk for food poisoning during the summer months. Know how to properly handle, store and prepare food in warm conditions.
